gmail_label_query_note: Use label:Avaris (display name) in Gmail search_threads queries, not label:Label_1 (the ID) — the ID form returns zero results even though list_labels reports it correctly.
notes: gmail_cursor is the timestamp of the newest alert email processed so far; each daily run should only consider messages newer than this, then advance it. StrategyConnect, MoveMeOn, and Clutch added 2026-07-20 after being spotted as new registrations in the inbox. MoveMeOn is a strategy-consulting-focused marketplace, worth prioritizing. Clutch is an agency directory (inbound leads), not a gig board — track but don't score against it. BTG occasionally sends 'new projects available' notifications with no brief text included; these can't be auto-scored and need a manual portal login to review.
